The '''Heavy Guardian''' was a model of large, bipedal [[Droid/Legends|droids]] with three grasping claws on either arm. [[G0-T0]] kept a number of such droids aboard his [[Visionary|Droid Yacht]] to attack intruders. He kept more of the same model on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], using them as [[Spy/Legends|spies]] and [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]]. Those on Nar Shaddaa went under the guise of cleaning droids, using sonic waves to clean. Identical droids served as maintenance droids in the warehouse of [[Vogga]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
